content: The World Health Organization (WHO) lists the Nipah virus as a developing disease that could cause a global pandemic. Ebola and Zika are also on this list.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Hybrid (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:L'Organizzazione Mondiale della Sanità (OMS) elenca il virus Nipah come una malattia in via di sviluppo che potrebbe cau
